 • A beneficiary transfers to another HHA; or 
 • A discharge and return to home health during the 60-day certification. 

For recertification of home health services, the physician or allowed practitioner must 
certify (attest) that: 
 1. The home health services are or were needed because the patient is or was 
confined to the home as defined in §30.1;
